notes: Editor doesn't work. The presets and the general gameplay works fine though
title: SimpleRockets 2

notes:
Game is completely playable (editor + actually flying the spacecraft). I did not experience any performance problems at all.
 Ending the game through the main menu option causes a Unity Engine crash, but at that point you wanted to close the game anyways, so the crash is no big deal.
title: SimpleRockets 2
